name: Cosmos DB account has no IP firewall rules configured
description: This Cosmos DB account has no IP-based firewall rules configured and public network access is enabled. Any IP address can reach the account's data plane endpoints, relying solely on the primary/secondary key or AAD authentication for protection.
remediation: Configure IP firewall rules to restrict access to known application and management IP ranges. For production workloads, prefer private endpoints over IP-based access controls. Remove the 0.0.0.0 catch-all rule that allows all Azure services.
